description: Three pairs of socks in black, grey and white Elastane welt for firm 'no-sag' grip Terry inside for superior cushioning and absorbency Rib knit cuff with branding and a roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Three dimensional shaped heel and toe for a good FitProcured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) &ndash the India licensee for Playboy Men&rsquo s Underwear
